sentences.arabic: يَتَطَوَّرُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija se razvija veoma brzo u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is developing very quickly in this era.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ الْأَطِبَّاءَ فِي تَشْخِيصِ الْأَمْرَاضِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija pomaže ljekarima u preciznom dijagnosticiranju bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: This technology helps doctors diagnose diseases accurately.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّرِكَاتِ تَسْتَخْدِمُهُ لِتَحْسِينِ خِدْمَاتِهَا لِلزَّبَائِنِ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge kompanije je koriste kako bi poboljšale svoje usluge za klijente.
sentences.translationEn: Many companies use it to improve their services for customers.
